message:
fix(freeze): add safety checks to prevent frozen function codegen issues

Add multiple checks to reject functions that would produce incorrect
frozen code:

- Reject functions with goto instructions (ternary expressions cause
  stack mismatch at merge points)
- Reject functions using push_this (constructors/methods need proper
  this binding that hook injection doesn't provide)
- Reject functions with >10 closure variables (state sync issues)
- Reject functions that write closure vars AND make calls (unsafe
  closure pattern)
- Reject self-recursive functions (self-reference handling issues)

These checks fix tsc compilation without --skipLibCheck by preventing
problematic functions like isResolvedByTypeAlias, NodeLinks, and
getDisplayNameTextOfOption from being frozen incorrectly.
